title: ZA Palooza Festival — Live Music & Food
description: Third annual ZA Palooza brings together live music, food vendors, and a full day party atmosphere in the heart of Atlanta. Two days of performances — catch Sunday for the prime afternoon/evening slot. Great energy, diverse crowd, and lots of photo ops.
location: 183 Forsyth St SW, Atlanta — Sun Apr 19, 3 PM onwards
vibe: Energetic, festival, social — good for couples who love music and street food vibes

title: The South Got Something To Say — ATL Day Party
description: An afternoon day party with live music, good vibes, and Atlanta energy. Runs 2–7 PM so you can make a day of it, then grab dinner after. Dress cute, bring your crew, or keep it intimate for two.
location: Rock Steady, Atlanta — Sun Apr 19, 2–7 PM
vibe: Chill day party, outdoor-friendly, social and fun

title: Lov'n It Live — Raw Vegan Date Night
description: No-compromises raw-food vegan restaurant in East Point. Creative nut-based dishes, cold-pressed juices, and an entirely plant-based menu. Unique and memorable — great for a couple who loves food adventures and eating well.
location: 2796 E Point St, East Point — Open Sat & Sun, call ahead for hours (404-765-9220)
